[CV]

My name is Yun (Catherine) Cheng. I’m currently enrolled in Carnegie Mellon University as a junior studying discrete math and computer science.

Projects

  • Ellipsoid Fitting (research) (2020)
  • Emotion Detection with Ensemble-based CNN (2020)
  • Tradeoff between Accuracy and Robustness in Multimodal Learning (2020)
